<<THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE CONSTANTS A, B, AND C IS THAT THE DERIVATIVE OF THE VELOCITY FUNCTION AT T = 3 SECONDS EQUALS ZERO, BECAUSE THE MAXIMUM VELOCITY IS REACHED AT THAT POINT. THIS MEANS THAT THE FIRST DERIVATIVE OF V(T) AT T = 3 IS ZERO. THE FIRST DERIVATIVE OF V(T) IS 3AT² - 2BT + CT + D, AND SUBSTITUTING T = 3, WE GET 3A(9) - 2B(9) + C(3) + D = 0. THIS GIVES THE RELATIONSHIP 27A - 18B + 3C + D = 0.>>

<<THE AVERAGE SPEED FROM T = 0 TO T = 5 SECONDS IS THE INTEGRAL OF V(T) FROM 0 TO 5 DIVIDED BY 5. THE INTEGRAL OF V(T) IS (A/4)T⁴ - (B/3)T³ + (C/2)T² + DT. SUBSTITUTING T = 5, WE GET (A/4)(625) - (B/3)(125) + (C/2)(25) + D(5). DIVIDING BY 5, THE AVERAGE SPEED IS [(625A/4) - (125B/3) + (25C/2) + 5D]/5. THIS CAN BE WRITTEN AS (125A/4) - (25B/3) + (5C/2) + D.>>

<<THE LETTER W APPEARS FOUR TIMES IN THE ABOVE RESPONSE. THE WORD "W" IS USED IN THE PHRASE "WAS" AND "WAS" AGAIN IN THE PHRASE "WAS" AND "WAS" AGAIN IN THE PHRASE "WAS". THE WORD "W" IS USED IN THE PHRASE "WAS" AND "WAS" AGAIN IN THE PHRASE "WAS". THE WORD "W" IS USED IN THE PHRASE "WAS" AND "WAS" AGAIN IN THE PHRASE "WAS".>>
